title: MadGuys Prison Official Visual Modpack
description: A collection of mods & Resourcepacks designed to enhance the visuals of minecraft for MadGuys Prison.
body:
The **Official MadGuys Prison Visual Pack** is a client-side-only collection of visual mods and resource packs, designed specifically to enhance the aesthetics of the MadGuys Prison server. It adds stunning shaders, detailed textures, and enhanced lighting effects, bringing the Prison to life like never before, all while keeping gameplay fully vanilla and server-compatible.

**Features:**
- **Enhanced Visuals:** Carefully selected visual mods and resource packs that make the prison world more vibrant and immersive, highlighting every detail from the cell-blocks to the prison mines.
- **Shaders for Atmosphere:** Optional shaders add dynamic lighting, shadows, and realistic effects that transform the server's look and feel.
- **Fully Client-Side:** This pack is completely client-side, meaning it won’t interfere with server mechanics or gameplay. *Note: Visual differences may occur if playing on a Minecraft version that differs from the server's version.*

**Why Download?**\
This visual pack is tailored to maximize your experience on the MadGuys Prison server, making it the best way to see the server as intended. It enhances the visuals without impacting performance for most systems, with adjustable settings for lower-end hardware. Explore the Prison as you’ve never seen it before, with visuals that truly pop.

**Connect:**
- Server IP: play.madguys.gg
- Discord: https://discord.madguys.gg

**Notes:**
- This is not a traditional modpack, it’s strictly for visual enhancements.
- Designed specifically for the MadGuys Prison server to provide an optimized and visually stunning experience.
